title: Fresh Crispy Algerian Ham Tagine
description: A date-night dish that combines the freshness of Mediterranean flavors with the crunch of a crispy crust, all wrapped up in an Algerian-inspired ham tagine.

ingredients.name: Ham Steaks
ingredients.notes: About 1 inch thick and 6 ounces each

instructions: Roll out the pastry dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut the dough into 4 equal-sized squares.
Place a ham steak in the center of each square, leaving a 1/2 inch border around it.
Drizzle the lemon juice over the ham, then sprinkle with cilantro, salt, and pepper.
Fold the dough over the ham, pressing the edges to seal.
Brush the tops with olive oil, then sprinkle with garlic, onions, olives, artichoke hearts, and Algerian spice blend.
Place the tagines on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving about 1 inch of space between each one.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and crispy.
Serve hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
